programmes.show_description: Programmes Start at 07:00.
The Big Build (Part 2): During the renovation of Peppa's home, they find out the construction crew used the robot house blueprint Peppa and George made!
Coinnigh San Aer É!: Tá Bluey, Bingo agus Mam ag imirt Balún in Airde ar fud an tí leis an mbalún deireanach atá acu.
Deaide an Róbó: Níl Bluey ná Bingo ag iarraidh an seomra spraoi a ghlanadh agus cuireann siad Deaid á dhéanamh (ós é Deaide Róbait é).
Hugs are great when you're sharing them with your friends and family.
Hedgie Puddles: Nettie and Pins enjoy playing in the rain. However, when they come upon a puddle, they aren't quite sure what to do.
Dylan the Farmer wants to pick his crops at harvest time, but a persistent critter keeps trying to pick the food before it's ready!
Dylan the Pizza Chef wants to make the best pizza ever, but to do that he's going to have to think outside the pizza box!
Daniel and Margaret are playing on an obstacle course. When Daniel plays too fast, and Margaret gets upset. Daniel realizes that he needs to play gently with his baby sister.
When the friends collect pine cones in the meadow, they meet a little lost hedgehog and must help her find her way back home.
Dee encourages a friend to say 'j', and we go on an adventure around the sound. We wear some jumpers, ride on a jumbo jet and see a jaguar in a jungle!
The team goes where no Go Jetter has gone before, when Glitch tries to launch into space by attaching huge rocket boosters to Grim HQ.
Loop's New Best Friend: Animated comedy following the adventures of a red rescue motorcycle.
Fast Times At Oswaldo High: Oswaldo finds himself all alone at school....
Close Encounters of The Checho Kind: After watching 'Planet Checho' on TV, Oswaldo and Tobias try to find a way to meet Checho.

programmes.show_name: Lex and Plu Space Taxi Drivers
programmes.show_description: Soda Saves the Day: When Fur Taxi hasn't received any fares for a long time, a long-awaited fare suddenly arrives. But Fur Taxi's competition, Locomotor, has also found out about it!
The Pet Badge: The Squirrels meet a Scrufflelump in the woods, and despite Duggee's reservations, take him in. But they soon learn the responsibilities of taking care of a pet.
The Lost Property Badge: The Squirrels lose Tag in the Clubhouse but to find him they're going to have to figure out where the Lost Property room is.
Sonia and Hugo's baby friends bring chaos to their game until they learn why babies play in a different way. (SL)
When Sonia's beach bath game gets her even messier than when she started, she discovers there is a time and place for everything. (SL)
Puffy Opposite Popcorn: Fuzzy Yellow climbs a popcorn tree, then gets stuck in the gate on the way to Bao Bao's party. The friends help out. (SL)
The Big Build (Part 2): During the renovation of Peppa's home, they find out the construction crew used the robot house blueprint Peppa and George made!
Coinnigh San Aer É!: Tá Bluey, Bingo agus Mam ag imirt Balún in Airde ar fud an tí leis an mbalún deireanach atá acu.
Deaide an Róbó: Níl Bluey ná Bingo ag iarraidh an seomra spraoi a ghlanadh agus cuireann siad Deaid á dhéanamh (ós é Deaide Róbait é).
Hugs are great when you're sharing them with your friends and family.
Safary so Goody: The friends are on safari and collect stars for every animal they spot! Mae-Mae wants to see them all but things take a muddy turn.
All the instruments are excited about a big concert, but the conductor is nowhere to be found, so Henry helps them put on a big orchestral performance.
The Frozen Planet: The Game Catchers land on the Frozen Planet but have to travel through large tunnels of ice before they can meet the local alien kids.
All It Takes Is a Pinch of Courage: The Game Catchers land on the Planet of Constructions, where they learn the game 'Steal the Monster's Treasure'.

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: Bridge Builders: Sandy and Carly are attempting to fix a bridge that has collapsed so Thomas and Percy can make a big delivery.
Just as Mister Witch brews a magic potion that brings objects to life, a storm blows down his hut. The potion falls on everything he owns and chaos follows!
Lily finds a sculpting tool and imagines that it was lost when Lord Stag commissioned a giant statue from Wee Rabbit.
Lily finds an adorable hermit crab and they become friends.
Tá gairdín taobh amuigh ag Grúpa Spraoi Peppa. Bíonn spraoi ag na páistí agus iad ag cur plandaí éagsúla agus ag dul i bhfolach ar a chéile sa gcoill fhiáin.
Tá Grandpa Pig, Grandad Dog, Peppa, George agus Danny ag dul ag babhláil. Ní raibh Peppa, George ná Grandpa Pig ag babhláil riamh cheana.
Lúbra Lán-Chasta: Téann Breacaí agus Peann Luaidhe ar strae i lúbra atá lán le castaí, cora agus coirnéil. Castar buachaill orthu a bhfuil cuidiú de dhíth air!
Seó Puipéad: Tá Peann Luaidhe ag ligean a scíthe agus cuireann Breacaí agus Éinín Buí seó puipéad ar siúl mar shiamsaíocht dóibh féin.
Mossy dochreidte: Téann Oona i bhfostú i sreangán iascaireachta cóngarach d'Aill na bhFaoileán!
Sliogán speisialta: Tá Baba tinn agus caithfidh sé fanacht sa pholl.
Fowl Play: The little birds challenge the big ones to a football match.
Hedgie Puddles: Nettie and Pins enjoy playing in the rain. However, when they come upon a puddle, they aren't quite sure what to do.
Mountain Gorillas: Andy Day takes Kip the cat to see mountain gorillas in Uganda, where they watch the creatures wrestle and swing from the branches.
Loop's New Best Friend: Animated comedy following the adventures of a red rescue motorcycle.

programmes.show_name: Nina and the Neurons: Brilliant Bodies
programmes.show_description: Sleep: Nina reveals why babies and children need more sleep than grown-ups, and compares the brain's activity during the night to a postman sorting letters at a post office.

Tá go leor le déanamh ar an gcrús, ar nós bricfeasta a ithe sa gcaifé foghlaithe mara!
Stopann an crús ag oileán agus ceannaíonn an teaghlach go leor rudaí beaga.

programmes.show_name: Nina and the Neurons: Brilliant Bodies
programmes.show_description: Sleep: Nina reveals why babies and children need more sleep than grown-ups, and compares the brain's activity during the night to a postman sorting letters at a post office.
Mission: Birthday Surprise: It's Mum's birthday, and Rayane is preparing an extra special secret birthday surprise.
MeMo is frustrated with a messy painting. BaBa and friends help MeMo to see its beauty.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Decorating (Part 3): Peppa and George are shocked to find their new bedrooms empty! Mummy and Daddy Pig tell them they will be the ones decorate their rooms,
Scáthlann: Le linn dóibh bheith ar phicnic sa pháirc, imríonn Bluey, Coco agus Snickers cluiche Scáthlainne.
An Deireadh Seachtaine: Tá Bluey agus Bingo ag spraoi sa ghairdín le Deaid ar an deireadh seachtaine.
Dad is rushing around and Punky shows us how important it is to slow down at times.
Hedgie Birthday: Pins and Nettie have been invited to the birthday party of one of their hedgie friends
Dylan the Weather Reporter wants to report on ALL the weather, but when the sun won't come out, he'll have to get creative.
Dylan wants to do a successful search and rescue mission, but he can't find someone to save!
Daniel Tiger is playing slowly outside at school, but his friends start to play too fast and rough with him.
Fia and Ameer are excited to taste Pip's famous Fairy Island pancakes - but first they need to ask the bees to share their honey.
Dee encourages a friend to say 'k', and we go on an adventure around the sound. We see some kittens, fly some kites and meet a kind kangaroo!
The Go Jetters join Ubercorn in the Go Jet Academy to try out a brand new super vacuum that reportedly can suck up bad weather.
Long Way Around: Animated comedy following the adventures of a red rescue motorcycle.
Bicycle Diaries: In frustration having lost a game, Oswaldo takes off on his own mini bicycle adventure.
Brunch Club: Left in a classroom, the kids think they are being punished and reveal their 'crimes'.

programmes.show_name: Lex and Plu Space Taxi Drivers
programmes.show_description: The Space-Bracelet: The Fur Taxi team goes on a picnic. Lex suddenly informs everyone that a tropical cyclone is approaching, and so they'll have to wrap up their picnic early.
The Mountain Badge: The Squirrels need to rescue Enid when they see her at the top of the Mighty Sugar Bun Mountain.
The Accessory Badge: The Squirrels see Duggee accessorising his tie and want to learn how to do it themselves. All of the Squirrels accessorise an item and showcase their goods.
Zoom wants to find out how to stop an egg from breaking when it falls, so the kids make a parachute for an egg. (SL)
Rules Seek Spiral: Fuzzy Yellow and Marzipan play hide-and-seek, but Fuzzy Yellow has trouble learning the rules of the game. (SL)
Decorating (Part 3): Peppa and George are shocked to find their new bedrooms empty! Mummy and Daddy Pig tell them they will be the ones decorate their rooms,
Scáthlann: Le linn dóibh bheith ar phicnic sa pháirc, imríonn Bluey, Coco agus Snickers cluiche Scáthlainne.
An Deireadh Seachtaine: Tá Bluey agus Bingo ag spraoi sa ghairdín le Deaid ar an deireadh seachtaine.
Dad is rushing around and Punky shows us how important it is to slow down at times.
Fairy Tale Trail: Zip and the friends are going on a fairy tale scavenger hunt! But when Zip becomes unsure about the clues, will the friends still get their magical fairy tale prize?
Today Henry meets a camera. Camera is down in the dumps because he thinks his photographs are boring and he wants to photograph something no one else has.....The Loch Ness Monster!
The Halloween Planet: The Game Catchers land on the Halloween Planet, but on their travels, Pigi has fun startling his friends.
The Planet of Colours: The Game Catchers land on the Colour Planet and learn the game 'Find The Pair'.

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: Feels of Sodor: When a heavy fog settles over Sodor, Thomas has to take cruise ship passengers on a tour, but it's clear they won't SEE much on their scenic tour.
When Dragon pricks her finger on a spinning wheel, she suddenly begins to shake and rattle. Mouse and Prince try to find out what's going on.
Lily finds Delilah's winch handle and as a reward Salty gives her a ball from the store. When it rains, Lily and Gull invent a new game called Splatball.
Lily spots a large mysterious blue rock in the sea, but Salty does not see it and thinks Lily is imagining it, so she sets out to prove that it exists.
Tá rang snámha ag na páistí le Miss Rabbit. Tá siad i linn snámha na bpáistí beaga. Ag deireadh an ranga, tugtar amach bréagain mhóra agus bíonn sleamhnán mór ann.
Tá Peppa agus George ag dul ar chrús in éineacht le Granny agus Grandpa Pig chun a scíth a ligean, ach téann Peppa agus Grandpa Pig amú!
Eachtráin: Nuair a thuairteann UFO in aice le puball Bhreacaí, téann sí ar thuras ina sceitsleabhar le beirt eachtrán neirbhíseach ón spás.
Leathanach Bán: Nuair a thiteann subh mhilis ar sceitsleabhar glan Claudia Moanet, cuidíonn Breacaí leis an ealaíontóir dul i ngleic leis na constaicí ar a cruthaitheacht.
Tacsaí turtair: Tagann Bernadette, cara le Bernie, ar cuairt chuige ach éiríonn sí i dtrioblóid nuair a scuabann an taoide léi í.
Comharsana nua: Nuair a bhogann an droimneach mór isteach ar Aill na bhFaoileán, bogann na faoileáin eile amach.
The Deputy: The owl is sure he can be a deputy camp leader.
Hedgie Birthday: Pins and Nettie have been invited to the birthday party of one of their hedgie friends
Chinstrap Penguins: Andy and Kip watch chinstrap penguins in the Antarctic, and learn how they hunt for fish and deliver food to their chicks.
Long Way Around: Animated comedy following the adventures of a red rescue motorcycle.

Mission: Bus Ride: Disability assistance dog Tinks needs all her super fetch skills and big dog energy as she helps Charli catch a bus to meet her friend Lydia, who is getting married.
Body Beats: While searching for unique sounds that their bodies can make, Mum introduces Maddie + Triggs to one of the tiniest sounds of all - the sound of their own heart beat.

Dylan wants to do a successful search and rescue mission, but he can't find someone to save!
